parameters.content:
## Manual Photo Upload Path
User uploaded a photo directly from their device.
Converts base64 → binary → uploads to Supabase Storage.

## OG Image Download Path (NEW)
When no manual photo but ogImageUrl exists:
1. Check OG Image — detects ogImageUrl
2. Has OG Image? — IF branch
3. Download OG Image — fetches binary from URL
4. Prepare OG Photo for Upload — renames, prepares binary
5. Upload to Supabase Storage — same node as manual path

Result: photo_url is always a permanent Supabase URL.
No more 403s from Instagram / Facebook CDN.
